See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 88011 => 'Citycell', 88013 => 'Grameenphone', 88014 => 'Banglalink', 88015 => 'TeleTalk', 88016 => 'Robi', 88017 => 'Grameenphone', 88018 => 'Robi', 88019 => 'Banglalink', ];
